touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Isabella Osei at MomentumEdge expressing interest in improving forecasting accuracy for their sales team. Initial contact established.
next_steps: Schedule qualification call to understand requirements

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Isabella confirming receipt of inbound request and proposing times for qualification call. Isabella responded positively and confirmed availability.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical timeline for the qualification process?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 1-2 weeks depending on stakeholder availability

next_steps: Qualification call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Isabella covered current forecasting challenges at MomentumEdge. Isabella mentioned she recently started as Director of Sales and wants to establish better predictability across 55-person sales team. Discussed automation needs and potential consulting support.

questions_asked.question: What forecasting tools are you currently using?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly spreadsheets and native Salesforce reports, but accuracy has been inconsistent

questions_asked.question: How quickly can we see improvement in forecast accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Most clients see measurable improvements within 30-60 days of implementation

next_steps: Schedule deeper discovery call with key stakeholders

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with discovery questionnaire and resources on forecasting best practices. Isabella confirmed she'll complete questionnaire and loop in RevOps and sales management team for next call.
Brief follow-up call with Isabella to clarify questionnaire responses. Discussed timeline expectations and confirmed involvement of Willow Scott (SVP Revenue) and RevOps team in evaluation process.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in the evaluation from your side?
questions_asked.answer: Willow Scott will be the executive sponsor, and we'll need IT and implementation folks involved for technical review

next_steps: Coordinate calendars for broader team discovery

touches.ai_summary: Email recapping previous call and proposing discovery session agenda. Shared case study from similar marketing agency client. Isabella confirmed agenda looks good and is working on getting RevOps analyst Hazel Flores involved.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled with extended team

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Isabella and Carter Rodriguez (Sales Manager) explored specific forecasting pain points across regional teams. Discussed integration requirements and data quality concerns. Carter mentioned they need better visibility into pipeline health.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform handle integration with our existing tech stack?
questions_asked.answer: We have native integrations with major CRMs and can work with IT on custom connections as needed

questions_asked.question: What's your current forecast-to-actual variance?
questions_asked.answer: We're seeing 20-25% variance which is causing planning issues

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Ethan Pereira (IT Director) covering security, data architecture, integration capabilities, and implementation requirements. Ethan asked detailed questions about API access, data residency, and SSO configuration. Technical review went well with no major blockers identified.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and where is data stored?
questions_asked.answer: Data retained per customer requirements, stored in SOC2-compliant infrastructure with regional options

questions_asked.question: Do you support SAML SSO with our Okta setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full SAML 2.0 support with Okta and other major identity providers

questions_asked.question: What's your typical timeline for implementation at this scale?
questions_asked.answer: For 55 seats we'd estimate 6-8 weeks including data migration and training

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Isabella, Carter, Hazel Flores (RevOps Analyst), and Leo Hill (Sales Manager) showcasing forecasting automation, reporting capabilities, and consulting support model. Team engaged positively with automation features. Hazel asked good questions about data modeling and custom fields.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize forecasting models by region and product line?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full customization available with our automations plus consulting tier

questions_asked.question: What level of consulting support is included in the package?
questions_asked.answer: Monthly strategic reviews and quarterly optimization sessions with dedicated analyst

questions_asked.question: Which features are most critical for your Q2 planning cycle?
questions_asked.answer: Pipeline velocity tracking and automated commit forecasting are top priorities

touches.ai_summary: Executive briefing with Willow Scott (SVP Revenue) focusing on business value, ROI projections, and strategic alignment. Willow emphasized importance of forecast accuracy for board reporting and investor confidence. Discussed budget and timing for Q2 implementation.

questions_asked.question: What ROI are similar companies seeing with your platform?
questions_asked.answer: Marketing agencies typically see 15-20% improvement in forecast accuracy and 10+ hours saved per week in reporting

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency for Q2 implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Board wants better predictability heading into second half planning cycle

touches.ai_summary: Email sent to Isabella with formal proposal including 55-seat license for automations plus consulting package at $75,900 ACV. Proposal includes implementation timeline, success metrics, and consulting engagement scope.

questions_asked.question: Is the consulting engagement flexibly scheduled or fixed cadence?
questions_asked.answer: Flexible scheduling within monthly/quarterly framework to align with your planning cycles

next_steps: Isabella to review with Willow and finance

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in on proposal review status. Isabella responded that finance is reviewing and Willow wants to discuss implementation timeline and payment terms. Isabella mentioned being new to the role and wanting to ensure smooth process.
next_steps: Schedule follow-up with Willow to address questions

touches.ai_summary: Executive follow-up meeting with Willow Scott and Isabella to discuss proposal details. Willow requested flexibility on payment terms and wanted to understand implementation support during Q2 given team bandwidth constraints. Discussed phased rollout approach and training schedule.

questions_asked.question: Can we structure payment as quarterly rather than annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can accommodate quarterly payments with standard terms

questions_asked.question: What level of hands-on support during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated implementation manager plus consulting analyst for first 90 days

next_steps: Update proposal with quarterly payment terms

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Isabella covering final contract terms. Discussed minor adjustments to consulting scope and confirmed implementation timeline fits with Q2 planning needs. Isabella comfortable moving forward pending final pricing review.

questions_asked.question: Are there any remaining concerns from the stakeholder group?
questions_asked.answer: No major concerns, just want to ensure pricing is locked for multi-year if we expand

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Isabella and Camila Stern (Account Manager) to finalize commercial terms. Discussed seat expansion pricing for year two, quarterly payment structure, and renewal terms. Team comfortable with $75,900 ACV for 55 seats. Reviewed implementation milestones and success criteria.

questions_asked.question: What's the pricing if we need to add seats mid-year?
questions_asked.answer: Pro-rated at same per-seat rate with quarterly true-up

questions_asked.question: Can we get price protection for year two renewal?
questions_asked.answer: Standard renewal includes 5% annual increase cap with expansion pricing locked

questions_asked.question: Who will be primary point of contact during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Aiden King and Valentina Kim from implementation team will lead with Camila as account owner

next_steps: Send final contract for legal review

touches.ai_summary: Final confirmation email sent with updated contract reflecting quarterly payment terms and agreed pricing. Isabella confirmed legal review in progress and expects signature within one week. Discussed implementation kickoff date and team introductions.
